name: WPG (Shanghai) Smart Water Public Co., Ltd.
summary: WPG (Shanghai) Smart Water Public Co., Ltd. engages in the research and consulting, program design, production, software development, and operation and maintenance services of equipment in the domestic water supply industry. It offers water supply, centralized drinking water, non-negative pressure water supply, and inverter equipment; tap water booster station; and ward water pumps, as well as smart water management platform. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Shanghai, China.
